justification: The diff correctly migrates javax to jakarta namespaces and updates Spring/Hibernate versions, but only targets Java 17 instead of 21 (line 14). It uses modern Spring annotations like @PostMapping (lines 33, 33, 47) and the <release> compiler flag (line 154), but misses Java 21-specific idioms like virtual threads or pattern matching for switch. The removal of junit dependency (lines 131-136) is questionable churn without a replacement.
